name: idea synthesis — happy path: 3-turn history → requestIdeaSummary → confirmIdea AFFIRM → PIPELINE + IDEATION + vision.md with vision_locked:true (PHASE-17 gate #3)
description: RED (before PHASE-17 Step 2): requestIdeaSummary/confirmIdea not exported → TypeError → FAIL. RED (before Step 2.5): vision.md written without YAML frontmatter → vision_locked_true=false, vision_frontmatter_valid=false → FAIL. GREEN (after Steps 2+2.5): full real-path flow — engine reads pre-seeded conversation history, calls ideaSynthesisProvider (mock key S236), writes idea_summary.json, sets IDEA_REVIEW; confirmIdea AFFIRM writes vision.md with vision_locked:true YAML frontmatter, sets conversation_mode=PIPELINE and active_runtime_state=IDEATION.
